'''tangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lecithotrophically|lecithotrophically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lecithotrophically|lecithotrophically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tangate|tangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tangatesher|tangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tangatesherĂ«m|tangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tangatero|tangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tangateshĂ«|tangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tangateshĂ«m|tangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitangatero|gokitangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitangateshĂ«|gokitangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitangateshĂ«m|gokitangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotangankerom|gotangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotangankeshĂ«|gotangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotangankeshĂ«m|gotangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotangankeya|gotangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tangaterom|tangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tangatemu|tangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tangateya|tangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitangaterom|gokitangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitangatemu|gokitangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitangateya|gokitangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tangangate|tangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tangangatesher|tangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tangangatesherĂ«m|tangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tangangatero|tangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tangangateshĂ«|tangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tangangateshĂ«m|tangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitangangatero|gokitangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitangangateshĂ«|gokitangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitangangateshĂ«m|gokitangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotangangankerom|gotangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotangangankeshĂ«|gotangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotangangankeshĂ«m|gotangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotangangankeya|gotangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tangangaterom|tangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tangangatemu|tangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tangangateya|tangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitangangaterom|gokitangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitangangatemu|gokitangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitangangateya|gokitangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠngĂŠte|tĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠngĂŠtesher|tĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠngĂŠtero|tĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠngĂŠtero|gokitĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠngĂŠterom|tĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠngĂŠtemu|tĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠngĂŠteya|tĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠngĂŠterom|gokitĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠngĂŠteya|gokitĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafngafte|tafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafngaftesher|tafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafngaftesherĂ«m|tafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafngaftero|tafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafngafteshĂ«|tafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafngafteshĂ«m|tafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafngaftero|gokitafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafngafteshĂ«|gokitafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafngafteshĂ«m|gokitafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafngafnkerom|gotafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafngafnkeshĂ«|gotafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafngafnkeshĂ«m|gotafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafngafnkeya|gotafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafngafterom|tafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafngaftemu|tafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafngafteya|tafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafngafterom|gokitafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafngaftemu|gokitafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafngafteya|gokitafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
